scripts.build:backend: npm run build:runtime && npm run build:cloud
scripts.typecheck:backend: npm run typecheck:runtime && npm run typecheck:cloud
scripts.test:backend: npm run test:runtime && npm run test:cloud
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.format: npm run format:backend && npm run format:frontend
scripts.format:check: npm run format:check:backend && npm run format:check:frontend
scripts.check:backend: npm run check:package-manager && npm run format:check:backend && npm run lint:backend && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run test:backend
scripts.check:frontend: npm run format:check:frontend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n runtime,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @oplyr/runtime" "npm run dev --workspace @oplyr/web"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build --workspace @oplyr/desktop && concurrently -n web,desktop -c green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @oplyr/web" "ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 npm run start --workspace @oplyr/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build:stt && npm run build --workspace @oplyr/runtime && npm run build --workspace @oplyr/cloud-api && npm run build --workspace @oplyr/web && npm run build --workspace @oplyr/desktop
scripts.start: concurrently -n runtime,web -c blue,green "npm run start --workspace @oplyr/runtime" "npm run preview --workspace @oplyr/web"
